Petition For Order: 1a- For Instructions Regarding Invalidity Of Trust Or, In The Alternative, 1b- For Instructions Regarding Validity Of Trust And Appointment Of Successor Trustee And Distribution Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar Sep-06-2016 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: The following matters were heard together: PES-14-298208 Estate of Gloria Alicia Sol and PTR-16-299936 Trust of 1575 Treat Avenue, San Francisco.
Appearances: David Simon for (administrator/petitioner) Ana Guevara.

The Court stated that nothing further has been filed, that it is prepared to confirm the validity of the trust and appoint a successor trustee and that the successor trustee will need to be bonded. Mr. Simon stated that regarding the trust, there was joint tenancy. The Court stated that the property will pass by joint tenancy in the trust. Mr. Simon stated that 1/2 was held as fee simple and 1/2 was held as trust property. The Court stated that it is not ruling on distribution today, that it is directing to administer the trust and that if the only asset is the house it does not see why there is an estate. Mr. Simon stated that 1/2 of the house is held in the estate. The Court stated that both the estate and the trust are before us, that in regards to the trust it confirms the trustee and appoints her as successor trustee to administer in accordance with the trust, that they need to post bond for the value of the property in the trust, that they will need to pay the court fees that were waived as the trust now has assets and set a status date for filing of bond and payment of fees on October 11, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court addressed the estate, confirmed that there is nothing pending and that it can go off calendar, that it expects the order to be drafted quickly and once the order is signed the fees are to be paid and the bond posted and that the order should include the bond amount.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Fender. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order: 1a- For Instructions Regarding Invalidity Of Trust Or, In The Alternative, 1b- For Instructions Regarding Validity Of Trust And Appointment Of Successor Trustee And Distribution Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar Aug-02-2016 Continued To Sep-06-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order: 1a- For Instructions Regarding Invalidity Of Trust Or, In The Alternative, 1b- For Instructions Regarding Validity Of Trust And Appointment Of Successor Trustee And Distribution Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jul-06-2016 Continued To Aug-02-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Simon for (administrator) Ana Guevara. Mauricio Guevara, Jr., (beneficiary) in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that this is a petition for instructions regarding a trust that has been filed in an estate case. Mr. Simon reported that it has now been filed in trust case PTR-16-299936 with a hearing date of August 2, 2016 and asked that this petition be continued to be heard at the same time. Mr. Guevara stated that his sister is not cooperating, that he is trying to remove her and replace her with a cousin and asked if he could write a letter to the Judge. The Court stated that Mr. Guevara needs an attorney who would be able to help him file the appropriate petition and that he cannot write a letter to the Judge. The Petition for Instructions, etc., was continued to August 2, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court instructed Mr. Simon to think about whether there is any authority that title cannot be held by the same person in joint tenancy where that person is acting in different capacities.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)

Petition For Order: 1a- For Instructions Regarding Invalidity Of Trust Or, In The Alternative, 1b- For Instructions Regarding Validity Of Trust And Appointment Of Successor Trustee And Distribution Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jun-15-2016 Continued To Jul-06-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order: 1a- For Instructions Regarding Invalidity Of Trust Or, In The Alternative, 1b- For Instructions Regarding Validity Of Trust And Appointment Of Successor Trustee And Distribution Of Trust Assets
Off Calendar May-18-2016 Continued To Jun-15-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Mar-04-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David Simon appeared by Court Call and Selam Gezahegn in person for and with Ana Guevara (Petitioner). Jeanne Darrah for and with Maurice Guevara (Objector).

Ms. Darrah stated that all heirs are here except for Gloria Christina and that they agreed to have Ana Guevara appointed as administrator with limited authority with the condition that the administrator will waive her fees. Furthermore, she stated that the heirs are willing to give it a try but they will come back to court if things do not work out. The Court granted the petition for letters of administration and appointing Ana Guevara with limited authority (subject to receipt of the revised order). Bond in the amount of $20,000.00 is required.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Deputy S. Park. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jan-14-2015 Continued To Feb-25-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jeanne Darrah for and with Mauricio Guevara. David Simon for Petitioner. Robert Martinez (Son of Decedent) in Propria Persona.

Counsel indicated that the Parties have agreed to appointment of Robert Martinez as administrator with limited authority, with specific restrictions to which they have agreed. Ms. Darrah requested a continuance to allow Mr. Martinez time to hire Counsel and for filing of an amended petition. The Petition for Letters of Administration was continued to February 25, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy C. Clark. (Not Reported)
